## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] `black .` has been run (line length 88)
- [ ] README / examples updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] Change is backward-compatible, or a breaking change was discussed in an issue first
